memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Roger Corbet (died 1395)
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Roger Corbet (died 1395), of Moreton Corbet, Shropshire was a landowner and politician who was a knight of the shire for Shropshire in three Parliaments of England. He was involved in a series of …

zh.Shawbury, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾沙波利
zh.Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特
zh.Newcastle-under-Lyme, Staffordshire, Eng: 英國斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特萊-德-萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Corbet於大約1355年出生在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Robert Corbet52歲，母親Elizabeth Le Strange48歲。他於1374年與Margaret Erdington在英國史洛普爾沙波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他在英國史洛普爾被列為sheriff。他去世於大約1395年9月22日在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Corbet于大约1355年出生在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特时，他的父亲Robert Corbet52岁，母亲Elizabeth Le Strange48岁。他于1374年与Margaret Erdington在英国史洛普爾沙波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他在英国史洛普爾被列为sheriff。他去世于大约1395年9月22日在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Corbet was born about 1355, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, his father, Robert Corbet, was 52 and his mother, Elizabeth Le Strange, was 48. He married Margaret Erdington in 1374, in Shawbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Shropshire, England. He died about 22 September 1395, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Corbet est né environ 1355, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Corbet, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Le Strange, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Erdington en 1374, à Shawbury, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Shropshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 22 septembre 1395, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Corbet um 1355 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Corbet 52 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Le Strange 48. Er hat 1374 in Shawbury, Shropshire, England Margaret Erdington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Shropshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 22. September 1395 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Corbet è nato il circa 1355 nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Corbet, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Le Strange, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Erdington nel 1374, nel Shawbury, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Shropshire, England. Morì circa 22 settembre 1395, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Corbetが約1355年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Robert Corbetは52歳，母Elizabeth Le Strangeは48歳であった。1374年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシャウブリーでMargaret Erdingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。イギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は約1395年9月22日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Corbet(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Corbet(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Le Strange(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 슈럽실르 쇼버이에서 Margaret Erdington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 슈럽실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 대략 1395년 9월 22일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Corbet, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Le Strange, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Erdington em 1374, em Shawbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 22 de setembro de 1395, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Corbet родился около 1355 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Corbet было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Le Strange, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Erdington в 1374 г. в местности шавбури, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности шропшир, Англия. Он умер около 22 сентября 1395 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия.

sm.about 1355–about 22 September 1395: e tusa o le 1355–e tusa o le 22 Setema 1395

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Corbet nació aproximadamente 1355, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Corbet, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Le Strange, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Margaret Erdington en 1374, en Shawbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 22 de septiembre de 1395, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
